title: Bruce Schneier on Cybersecurity in the Age of Coronavirus
summary: Is Zoom secure? What about your home computer? Cyber expert Bruce Schneier says that we all need to be aware of the things cyber criminals thrive on during the confusion caused by coronavirus.
body: Is #Zoom secure? What about your home computer? #Cyber expert Bruce Schneier says that we all need to be aware of the things cyber criminals thrive on during the confusion caused by #coronavirus . #COVID19 pic.twitter.com/5Y39rwzXjs — Belfer Center (@BelferCenter) April 20, 2020 Bruce Schneier on Cybersecurity in the Age of Coronavirus Print Coronavirus Cyber Security Global Health Governance Information Technology Science & Technology Science, Technology, and Public Policy Related Bruce Schneier Request Interview More From This Expert Bruce Schneier's Testimony on "The Federal Government in the Age of Artificial Intelligence" Reimagining Democracy Up Next Photo Credit Toggle Associated Press - Daniel Kozin Blog Post H3N2 “Subclade K” Is Spreading.
